summary.authoritative_rule: the first event-attention supervision layer is now explicit: event trigger validity can be positive, misaligned, or raw-only, while 航天发展 is retained as the first hard attention-anchor and attention-decoy seed rather than being mistaken for board restart evidence

registry_rows.source_name: 搜狐/再升科技航天材料逻辑
registry_rows.evidence: supply-chain validation became visible inside a board-positive continuation window rather than inside a lockout

registry_rows.source_name: 东方财富财富号-盘中主要热点题材
registry_rows.evidence: capital-mapping event arrived before the January turning point and is retained as an early continuation watch, not a later unlock authority

registry_rows.source_name: 同花顺-商业航天板块集体跳水
registry_rows.evidence: theme-heat article became visible exactly at the decisive overheating and turning-point risk date

registry_rows.source_name: 新浪财经-华菱线缆收购星鑫航天事件
registry_rows.evidence: symbol-specific continuation logic appeared only after board lockout had already started, so it cannot be treated as board-supportive

registry_rows.source_name: 新浪/产业链梳理-卫星互联网核心企业概念股
registry_rows.evidence: supply-chain validation visible inside the lockout regime is still event-relevant but not board-validating

registry_rows.source_name: 韭研公社-持有蓝箭航天的各个公司
registry_rows.evidence: capital-mapping continuation theme exists after lockout end only in the raw-only window, before any legal board-state extension

registry_rows.source_name: 同花顺-商业航天板块集体跳水
registry_rows.evidence: the decisive turning-point source explicitly names 航天发展 as a high-recognition emotional axis inside overheated theme conditions
航天发展 acts as a visible attention anchor around the turning point, but later only repairs weakly, never clears prior peak, and never reopens board participation

interpretation: V1.34HW starts the event-attention layer conservatively: only evidence-hard event rows and the clearest role row are promoted.

This registry does not claim a full causal model of policy, attention, and capital. It only formalizes the first legal seeds so the next layer can grow without pretending incomplete information is complete.
